A quick and delicious protein source.', protein: 20, calories: 250, img: 'https://placehold.co/600x400/FCB53B/84994F?text=Paneer+Bhurji', }, { name: 'Sprouts Salad', description: 'A refreshing and crunchy salad made with mixed sprouts, chopped veggies, and a tangy lemon dressing.', protein: 15, calories: 180, img: 'https://placehold.co/600x400/84994F/FFFFFF?text=Sprouts+Salad', }, { name: 'Soya Chunks Curry', description: 'A hearty and flavorful curry made with soya chunks, which are an excellent plant-based protein.', protein: 25, calories: 300, img: 'https://placehold.co/600x400/B45253/FFE797?text=Soya+Curry', }, { name: 'Masoor Dal Tadka', description: 'Classic Indian red lentil soup tempered with aromatic spices. A staple for daily protein intake.', protein: 18, calories: 220, img: 'https://placehold.co/600x400/FFE797/84994F?text=Masoor+Dal', }, ]; const HomePage = () => { return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Sync Your Diet With Your Health Goals.

NutriSync is a modern nutrition tracker tailored for Indian users, helping you log meals, analyze nutrients, and get high-protein food recommendations.

Get Started for Free
{/* Featured Recipes Section */}

Featured High-Protein Recipes

{highProteinRecipes.map((recipe, index) => (

{recipe.name}

{recipe.description}

{recipe.protein}g Protein {recipe.calories} Calories
))}
{/* Educational Section */}

Why Nutrition Matters in India

{/* Protein Gap Card */}

The Protein Gap

A significant portion of Indian diets are protein-deficient, impacting muscle health, immunity, and overall energy levels. NutriSync helps you find and track high-protein foods to bridge this gap.

{/* Diabetes Challenge Card */}

The Diabetes Challenge

India is often called the "diabetes capital of the world." Managing carbohydrate and sugar intake is crucial. Our tracker provides clear insights to help you make balanced dietary choices.

); }; export default HomePage;
